modulesAnalyzed.name: API Routes
modulesAnalyzed.description: 14 route handlers covering auth, analyze, bulk, compare, history, results, email, health, posthog settings

modulesAnalyzed.name: Frontend Pages
modulesAnalyzed.description: 7 i18n-aware pages: home, analyze, bulk, compare, history, settings/posthog, shared report

modulesAnalyzed.name: React Components
modulesAnalyzed.description: 10 UI components: SignInModal, UserNav, ScoreGauge, ExpertCard, LoadingExpert, LanguageSwitcher, ComparisonBanner, SharedReportView, BulkReportView, PostHogGuide

modulesAnalyzed.name: Lib Utilities
modulesAnalyzed.description: 12 lib modules: ai-provider, analyze-pipeline, db, email, encrypt, logger, parse-json-response, posthog-advisor, posthog-client, rate-limit, scraper, session

modulesAnalyzed.name: Expert Prompt Builders
modulesAnalyzed.description: 6 expert modules: content, experiment, psychology, seo, ui-design, ux-research + shared types and index

modulesAnalyzed.name: Database Schema
modulesAnalyzed.description: 5 models: User, OtpToken, AnalysisResult, PostHogConfig, EmailCapture

modulesAnalyzed.name: Middleware & i18n
modulesAnalyzed.description: Next.js locale routing middleware and request configuration

modulesAnalyzed.name: Test Suite
modulesAnalyzed.description: 16 test files, 163 tests covering all API routes and key lib modules

checks.item: Navigation: all pages reachable, back works
checks.detail: All pages have back navigation via router.push('/') or Link components

checks.item: Responsive: mobile 375px / tablet 768px / desktop 1440px
checks.detail: Tailwind breakpoints used throughout; BulkReportView ranking table may overflow at 375px

checks.item: Loading states: skeleton/spinner on async ops
checks.detail: Most pages use spinners; history page uses text-only 'loading' state

checks.item: Empty states: no data, first use, no search results
checks.detail: History has empty state; BulkReportView renders empty table with no message if results array is empty

checks.item: Form behavior: validation, error messages, tab order
checks.detail: URL/email/OTP validated with inline errors; email capture input lacks id/label association

checks.item: Interactive states: hover, focus, active, disabled, loading, error
checks.detail: Buttons have hover/disabled states; UserNav dropdown missing aria-expanded/aria-haspopup

checks.item: Feedback: success/error notifications after actions
checks.detail: Most actions provide feedback; sign-out silently closes menu with no confirmation

checks.item: Route definitions match expected CRUD operations
checks.detail: All 14 endpoints cover expected CRUD patterns for the domain

checks.item: Status codes: correct codes for success, client error, server error
checks.detail: All routes use correct codes; /api/email has no try/catch so DB failure returns unhandled 500

checks.item: Input validation: request body/params validated before processing
checks.detail: All routes validate input; email validation uses only includes('@') — accepts malformed emails

checks.item: Error responses: consistent format with message
checks.detail: All routes use {error:'...'} format except /api/email which can crash without error response

checks.item: Pagination: offset/limit/sorting for list endpoints
checks.detail: /api/history uses cursor-based pagination with PAGE_SIZE=20, hasMore, nextCursor

checks.item: Idempotency: duplicate requests handled safely
checks.detail: Auth routes and settings use upsert correctly; email capture allows duplicate rows

checks.item: N+1 queries: no loops with DB calls inside
checks.detail: Promise.all used for parallel AI calls; no DB calls inside loops found

checks.item: Indexes: queries use indexed columns
checks.detail: userId and ip indexed separately but no composite index on (userId,createdAt) or (ip,createdAt)

checks.item: Payload size: responses don't return unnecessary data
checks.detail: History parses full multi-KB JSON blob per record just to extract scores — wastes memory

checks.item: Async operations: long tasks don't block request
checks.detail: All AI calls and scraping are properly async/await with Promise.all for parallelism

checks.item: Caching: repeated lookups cached where appropriate
checks.detail: PostHog config queried from DB on every authenticated analysis with no caching layer

checks.item: Bundle: no unnecessary imports inflating size
checks.detail: Resend SDK dynamically imported in email.ts; cheerio externalized in next.config.mjs

checks.item: Authentication: all routes behind auth middleware
checks.detail: History, results, settings auth-gated; analyze/bulk/compare open by design; email endpoint unauthenticated

checks.item: Authorization: RBAC checks per endpoint
checks.detail: History and settings scoped to session.userId; shared results public by design (no RBAC needed)

checks.item: Input sanitization: user input escaped/validated
checks.detail: URLs validated via new URL(); emails trimmed/lowercased; scraped content passed to LLM without sanitization (prompt injection risk)

checks.item: No data exposure: API doesn't leak sensitive fields
checks.detail: Auth/me returns only id+email; PostHog key masked; shared results include liveData from user's private PostHog account

checks.item: Rate limiting: abuse prevention on sensitive endpoints
checks.detail: Analyze/bulk/compare rate-limited; OTP request/verify endpoints have NO rate limiting — brute-force OTP possible

checks.item: Secrets: no hardcoded credentials, env vars used
checks.detail: All API keys from process.env; PostHog keys encrypted at rest

checks.item: SQL injection: parameterized queries
checks.detail: All DB access via Prisma ORM; no raw SQL found

checks.item: CRUD lifecycle: create/read/update/delete all consistent
checks.detail: Core CRUD consistent; /api/results POST omits ip field; no User/EmailCapture delete endpoints

checks.item: Foreign keys: relations enforced at DB level
checks.detail: Most FKs enforced; EmailCapture.slug has no FK to AnalysisResult — orphans possible on delete

checks.item: Unique constraints: duplicates prevented
checks.detail: slug unique, email unique, [slug,email] unique on EmailCapture, userId unique on PostHogConfig

checks.item: Cascade behavior: deletes don't orphan data
checks.detail: Deleting AnalysisResult leaves EmailCapture rows orphaned; OtpToken records accumulate indefinitely with no cleanup

checks.item: Transaction usage: multi-step writes wrapped in transactions
checks.detail: verify-otp correctly uses $transaction; request-otp 3-step write (upsert+updateMany+create) is not transactional

checks.item: Validation: business rules enforced before DB write
checks.detail: URL, email, OTP, and field validation in all routes before DB operations

checks.item: Health checks: app has liveness/readiness indicators
checks.detail: Health endpoint exists and returns 200; does not check DB connectivity or AI provider key presence

checks.item: Environment config: env vars for all environment-specific values
checks.detail: All secrets from process.env; SESSION_SECRET missing from .env.local.example — likely to be omitted in new deployments

checks.item: Logging: errors and key operations logged
checks.detail: Structured JSON logger used in all API routes for errors and key operations

checks.item: Error recovery: uncaught exceptions don't crash server
checks.detail: Try/catch in all route handlers; Next.js catches unhandled route exceptions

checks.item: Migration safety: schema changes are additive/safe
checks.detail: All 3 migrations verified additive-only; migration 3 uses safe SQLite table-redefinition pattern

checks.item: Docker: services properly containerized
checks.detail: No Dockerfile, docker-compose.yml, or .dockerignore found in repository

checks.item: Null/undefined: handled in inputs and DB results
checks.detail: Most null checks present; averageScore() divides by scores.length with no guard — returns NaN if experts object is empty

checks.item: Boundary values: min/max/overflow tested
checks.detail: Bulk min/max enforced; ScoreGauge does not clamp score to 0-100 — overflowing arc on malformed AI response

checks.item: Concurrent operations: race conditions addressed
checks.detail: verify-otp uses transaction; rate-limit check is non-atomic (read-then-compare); request-otp OTP operations not transactional

checks.item: Network failure: timeouts and retries for external calls
checks.detail: Scraper has 15s AbortSignal timeout; AI provider calls have no explicit timeout — can hang indefinitely

checks.item: State transitions: invalid state changes rejected
checks.detail: OTP can only be verified once; session cleared atomically on signout; bulk returns 502 if all analyses fail

checks.item: Graceful degradation: partial failures don't cascade
checks.detail: Bulk uses allSettled (good); PostHog enrichment failures caught gracefully; /api/email has no try/catch and will crash on DB failure

checks.item: ARIA: roles, labels, states on interactive elements
checks.detail: SignInModal has role=dialog+aria-modal; UserNav dropdown missing aria-expanded/aria-haspopup; ExpertCard expand button missing aria-expanded; LoadingExpert has no aria-live region

checks.item: Keyboard: all actions reachable via keyboard alone
checks.detail: All elements are native button/link; UserNav dropdown Escape key not handled; SignInModal no Escape handler

checks.item: Focus: visible focus indicators, logical order
checks.detail: Inputs have focus:ring-2; SignInModal uses FocusTrap; UserNav dropdown has no focus trap

checks.item: Color contrast: text >= 4.5:1, large text >= 3:1
checks.detail: text-gray-400 on white (#9ca3af) = 2.85:1 (fails AA); amber score color (#f59e0b) on white = 2.4:1 (fails AA)

checks.item: Screen reader: logical content order, decorative images hidden
checks.detail: All decorative SVG icons lack aria-hidden=true; emoji icons in expert cards rendered without aria-hidden

checks.item: Forms: all inputs labeled, errors announced
checks.detail: SignInModal labels lack htmlFor; PostHog settings labels lack htmlFor; email capture has no label; errors not linked via aria-describedby

checks.item: Skip links: bypass navigation available
checks.detail: No skip navigation link found anywhere in the application

checks.item: Consent: obtained before collecting PII
checks.detail: Email addresses collected via /api/email with no documented consent mechanism or privacy notice

checks.item: Retention: policies defined and enforced
checks.detail: No retention policies defined; AnalysisResult, EmailCapture, OtpToken, PostHogConfig accumulate indefinitely

checks.item: Right to delete: user data purgeable on request
checks.detail: No user account deletion endpoint; no erasure tooling; PostHogConfig DELETE exists but doesn't delete the user

checks.item: Audit logging: sensitive operations logged
checks.detail: No audit log for auth events, config changes, or data access — only operational stdout logging

checks.item: Cookie consent: tracking cookies require opt-in
checks.detail: No cookie consent banner or opt-in mechanism found anywhere in the codebase

checks.item: Encryption: PII encrypted at rest and in transit
checks.detail: PostHog keys encrypted with AES-256-CBC (should be GCM); fallback hardcoded key if SESSION_SECRET unset; IP addresses stored in plaintext

checks.item: Third-party: data sharing agreements documented
checks.detail: No documented DPA with PostHog, Resend, or AI providers (Anthropic/OpenAI) as sub-processors

checks.item: Structured logging: JSON format with correlation IDs
checks.detail: JSON structured logging implemented with timestamp/level/module/message; no requestId or traceId for request correlation

checks.item: Error tracking: captured with stack traces and context
checks.detail: Errors logged with stack traces to stdout; no error tracking service (Sentry/Bugsnag) for aggregation/alerting

checks.item: Metrics: business and technical KPIs exposed
checks.detail: No metrics endpoint; no StatsD/Prometheus client; no business KPI counters (analyses/day, error rate, rate-limit hit rate)

checks.item: Health endpoints: liveness and readiness probes
checks.detail: Liveness endpoint exists (/api/health); no readiness check with DB/provider dependency validation

checks.item: Alerting: defined for SLO violations
checks.detail: No alerting rules, PagerDuty/OpsGenie configs, or SLO definitions found in repository

checks.item: Tracing: distributed traces for cross-service requests
checks.detail: No OpenTelemetry or distributed tracing; 7+ AI calls per analysis have no trace context

checks.item: Dashboards: operational dashboards for key flows
checks.detail: No infrastructure operational dashboards; PostHog advisor generates user dashboards but not for the app itself

findings.description: No rate limiting on OTP request endpoint — attacker can flood victim's email or exhaust email provider quota
findings.risk: Spam / DoS / account harassment
findings.suggestion: Add IP-based rate limiting (e.g., 3 OTP requests per email per 15 minutes)

findings.description: No rate limiting or brute-force lockout on OTP verification — 6-digit OTP brute-forceable in 1M requests
findings.risk: Account takeover
findings.suggestion: Add attempt counter per OTP token; lock out after 5 failed attempts

findings.description: No try/catch around prisma.emailCapture.create — unhandled DB exception crashes the handler
findings.risk: Crash / data loss / 500 with stack trace exposure
findings.suggestion: Wrap in try/catch and return { error: 'Failed to save email' } with 500

findings.description: averageScore() divides by scores.length with no guard — returns NaN if experts object is empty; ScoreGauge renders broken arc
findings.risk: Silent rendering failure on malformed AI response
findings.suggestion: Add guard: if (scores.length === 0) return 0

findings.description: Hardcoded fallback encryption key when SESSION_SECRET is unset — PostHog API keys encrypted with publicly known key
findings.risk: Credential compromise if env var missing in staging/prod
findings.suggestion: Throw error unconditionally if SESSION_SECRET not set; do not fall back silently

findings.description: Email addresses (PII) collected via /api/email with no documented consent mechanism
findings.risk: GDPR Article 6 violation — no lawful basis for PII collection
findings.suggestion: Add explicit consent checkbox before email collection; document lawful basis

findings.description: No cookie consent banner or opt-in mechanism exists anywhere in the application
findings.risk: ePrivacy Directive / PECR compliance gap
findings.suggestion: Implement cookie consent banner before any non-essential cookies are set

findings.description: No authentication required on /api/email — anyone can associate arbitrary emails with any analysis slug
findings.risk: Email harvesting / spam campaigns using analysis slugs
findings.suggestion: Require authentication or add CAPTCHA to the email capture flow

findings.description: No rate limiting on email capture endpoint
findings.risk: Bulk email collection abuse
findings.suggestion: Apply rate limiting (e.g., 3 captures per IP per hour)

findings.description: SignInModal label elements have no htmlFor attribute — inputs not programmatically associated
findings.risk: Screen reader users cannot use sign-in form
findings.suggestion: Add id attributes to all inputs; add matching htmlFor to all labels

findings.description: PostHog settings form labels lack htmlFor; inputs have no id attributes
findings.risk: Screen reader users cannot use settings form
findings.suggestion: Add id/htmlFor pairs to all form controls

findings.description: Email capture input has no label element at all
findings.risk: Screen readers cannot identify the field purpose
findings.suggestion: Add visually-hidden <label> or aria-label to email capture input

findings.description: Dropdown toggle button missing aria-expanded, aria-haspopup, aria-controls attributes
findings.risk: Screen readers cannot interpret menu state
findings.suggestion: Add aria-expanded={isOpen} aria-haspopup='menu' aria-controls='user-menu' to toggle button

findings.description: Expert card expand/collapse button missing aria-expanded attribute
findings.risk: Screen readers cannot determine expanded/collapsed state
findings.suggestion: Add aria-expanded={isExpanded} to expand/collapse button

findings.description: No skip navigation link present anywhere in the application
findings.risk: Keyboard users must tab through entire header on every page
findings.suggestion: Add Skip to content in layout

findings.description:
Error messages rendered as

elements not linked to inputs via aria-describedby
findings.risk: Errors not announced to screen readers on form submission
findings.suggestion: Add id to error elements; add aria-describedby={errorId} to corresponding inputs

findings.description: Loading progress list has no role='status' or aria-live region
findings.risk: Screen readers cannot track analysis progress updates
findings.suggestion: Wrap loading list in <div role='status' aria-live='polite'>

findings.description: OTP token value logged in plaintext in dev mode when RESEND_API_KEY is unset — affects misconfigured staging
findings.risk: Authentication token exposure in log aggregation if staging misconfigured
findings.suggestion: Mask OTP in logs: log only first+last digit or presence flag

findings.description: No data retention policies; AnalysisResult, EmailCapture, OtpToken accumulate indefinitely
findings.risk: GDPR Article 5(1)(e) storage limitation principle violation
findings.suggestion: Add cron job to purge records older than 90 days; add TTL index on OtpToken

findings.description: No right-to-erasure implementation; no API endpoint to delete user account or associated data
findings.risk: GDPR Article 17 non-compliance
findings.suggestion: Implement DELETE /api/auth/account endpoint that removes User, AnalysisResult, EmailCapture, PostHogConfig

findings.description: IP addresses stored indefinitely in AnalysisResult without anonymization or retention limit
findings.risk: GDPR personal data storage violation
findings.suggestion: Anonymize IPs after 30 days (truncate last octet) or add to retention policy

findings.description: AES-256-CBC used instead of authenticated AES-256-GCM for PostHog API key encryption
findings.risk: Ciphertext integrity not guaranteed; padding oracle attack surface
findings.suggestion: Migrate to AES-256-GCM or ChaCha20-Poly1305; re-encrypt all stored keys

findings.description: Structured JSON logging lacks correlation/request IDs — impossible to trace a single request across log lines
findings.risk: Incident investigation significantly harder
findings.suggestion: Generate requestId in middleware; pass to all log calls via AsyncLocalStorage

findings.description: No error tracking service (Sentry/Bugsnag) integrated — production errors invisible without active log monitoring
findings.risk: Production errors go unnoticed
findings.suggestion: Integrate Sentry with Next.js; capture unhandled exceptions and route errors

findings.description: No metrics exposition — no Prometheus endpoint, StatsD client, or business KPI counters
findings.risk: No real-time operational visibility or SLO monitoring
findings.suggestion: Add /api/metrics endpoint with analysis count, error rate, rate-limit hits

findings.description: No alerting rules or SLO definitions exist in repository
findings.risk: Incidents not auto-detected; on-call has no automated notification
findings.suggestion: Define error rate and latency SLOs; set up alerting in monitoring platform

D1.gaps: Entire frontend untested — no component, page, or navigation tests

D2.gaps: No response header tests, no concurrent request tests

D3.gaps: No timing, caching, load, or N+1 query tests

D4.gaps: No CSRF, horizontal privilege escalation, or prompt injection tests

D5.gaps: No constraint violation, transaction rollback, or DB unavailable tests

D6.gaps: Only health endpoint and provider key tests; no env config, migration, or startup tests

D7.gaps: No extremely long input, binary content, or bulk all-fail tests

D9.gaps: No consent, privacy, retention, or audit tests

D10.gaps: No logging, metrics, or monitoring tests
